videos.title: Orkugangan 60 km Ski Race from Myvatn to Husavik, Iceland.
videos.description:
Orkugangan is a 60 km long cross country ski race from Krafla in the Mývatn area to the town of Húsavík by Skjálfandi bay.
Orkugangan is the longest ski race in Iceland and a point earning part of the Iceland race series Íslandsgangan. The trail is groomed and tracked.
The race derives its name from the abundant natural energy in this region. It runs through the active rift zone of Northeast Iceland where the Eurasian and North American tectonic plates are separating. The terrain along the trail is mostly untouched wilderness with volcanic landscape; mountain ranges, fissures, hot springs and vast open lava fields, some thousands of years old and others barely 30 years old, with variously shaped lava sculptures. Geothermal energy is abundant in the earth below and in some places its force is visible above the surface.

The view from the trail is incomparable, offering a changing variety of scenic delights as you make your way from Mount Leirhnjúkur in Krafla caldera, trekking across the resent lava past Þeistareykir geothermal area and overlooking Skjálfandi bay and the mountains across it on your final descend to the coastal village of Húsavík.

Further information is given info@orkugangan.is or www.orkugangan.is

videos.title: Fossavatn Ísafjorður 2019
videos.description: the snow was already gone in April which was actually unusual for that region, so they brought it  on big trucks from top parts of the fiords where it was still available :D

videos.title: Fossavatn Cross Country Ski Marathon, Iceland
videos.description: Fossavatn Cross-country Ski Marathon joined "World Loppet" in 2015. Experience this spectacular event in a land of fire and ice.

videos.title: Vasaloppet 2025 -  A Cross Country Ski Journey in Sweden
videos.description:
Ever wonder what it’s like to ski 90KM across Sweden in the legendary Vasaloppet? This is the classic cross country skiing race for beginners to professionals!

Join our group of friends as we take on the 2025 Vasaloppet, one of the world’s most iconic cross-country ski races. We follow  a seasoned Swedish skier, (and the rest of us!) as we battle frosty weather, test our endurance, and soak in Sweden’s breathtaking winter scenery. If you’re curious about long-distance Nordic skiing, this is your front-row seat to a true winter sports challenge.

0:00 – What is the Vasaloppet
2:03 – Preparing for the race
3:32 – Race Day
4:43 - The 90 km Race

Enjoy the video? Drop a comment about your own ski adventures and hit the like button if you’re up for more outdoor travel videos!
